creator: marco.broeder@posteo.eu
text:
Hello,

soon this PR is getting two months old. Besides the initial assignment, there 
was no further response or action, not even after my followup email a month 
ago. It is an unusual long delay compared to my previous experience of the 
overall ports PRs flow.

I extensively tested the port with all the possible (2^5 = 32) combinations of 
options the port provides (build, install, deinstall, pkg_add, pkg_delete, 
runtime). Everything went smooth and clean. I use the port myself regularly 
and did not encounter any problems.

So is anything wrong with it, I should know? Or was this PR just out of sight?

Thank you in advance!

Merry Christmas!

-- 
Regards
